mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month trend in PAYEMS signals improving household income and corporate revenue expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if PAYEMS 3-month growth has nonpositive Rank IC with 20-day S&P 500 returns over two consecutive 3-year walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in UNRATE signals deteriorating labor demand and rising recession risk, reducing expected earnings and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3pp over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered instances deliver positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or the mean triggered return exceeds the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: Rising RSAFS combined with falling UNRATE identifies demand growth supported by labor income, lifting earnings revisions and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS 3-month growth is positive and UNRATE falls over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if the joint signal does not outperform either RSAFS-only or UNRATE-only signals by at least 25 bps mean 20-day return in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Very low FEDFUNDS with nonaccelerating CPIAUCSL indicates accommodative real policy rates without an inflation shock, compressing discount rates and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS is below 0.5% and CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized inflation is below its 12-month rate
failure_condition: Reject if low-rate disinflation episodes have median 60-day S&P 500 returns at or below the unconditional median across walk-forward evaluation periods.

mechanism_narrative: A negative break in INDPRO signals falling production and weaker operating leverage, causing earnings downgrades and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO downside-break triggers show a positive average 20-day S&P 500 return or a hit rate below 52% for negative returns.

mechanism_narrative: An upward trend in HOUST signals improving housing demand, construction activity, and durable-goods spillovers, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST 6-month growth has Rank IC below 0.03 with 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than half of rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Rising FEDFUNDS while UNRATE is low identifies a tightening cycle aimed at restraining demand, increasing discount rates and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS rises by more than 0.25pp over 3 months while UNRATE is below 5.0%
failure_condition: Reject if tightening-with-low-unemployment triggers produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases after transaction-date alignment.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating CPIAUCSL with slowing RSAFS signals margin pressure and weakening real consumption, reducing near-term earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized inflation exceeds its 12-month rate and RSAFS 3-month growth is negative
failure_condition: Reject if the joint inflation-up sales-down condition has nonnegative average 5-day S&P 500 returns or fails to beat a CPIAUCSL-only signal in downside hit rate.
